summary: Shorten identifiers from 'jira-cloud-platform' to 'jira': binary names (jira-pp-cli, jira-pp-mcp), deconflict-prefixed subcommand groups (jira-{search,version,workflow}), env var prefix (JIRA_*), and per-resource file names. Human-prose 'Jira Cloud Platform' is preserved in descriptions, headings, and the MCP server display name.
reason: Identifiers were carried over from the OpenAPI spec title ('Jira Cloud Platform') and the long form caused the post-merge release build to fail because the workflow derived the build path from the directory basename ('jira') and looked for cmd/jira-pp-cli/ instead of cmd/jira-cloud-platform-pp-cli/. The shorter 'jira-' prefix still resolves the framework collisions with search/version/workflow that motivated the original prefix; the product name is retained in prose for recognition.
